meta.title: 動詞故事聽讀
meta.subtitle: 邊聽、邊讀、邊記動詞三態
meta.verified_by: Fable 5 自撰故事 + 動詞形態對照 verbs_grade7_v1.json 2026-07-06

sentences.en: Last Saturday *was* our school's sports day.
sentences.zh: 上週六是我們學校的運動會。

sentences.en: I *woke* up early because I *felt* nervous.
sentences.zh: 我很早就醒來，因為我覺得很緊張。

sentences.en: I *was* in the eight-hundred-meter race.
sentences.zh: 我要參加八百公尺賽跑。

sentences.en: My mom *made* a big breakfast, but I only *drank* some milk.
sentences.zh: 我媽做了豐盛的早餐，但我只喝了一點牛奶。

sentences.en: At school, I *met* my best friend, Kevin.
sentences.zh: 到了學校，我遇到我最好的朋友 Kevin。

sentences.en: He *brought* me a lucky bracelet and *said*, "You will win!"
sentences.zh: 他帶了一條幸運手環給我，還說：「你會贏！」

sentences.en: I *thought* he was just being kind.
sentences.zh: 我以為他只是在說好聽話。

sentences.en: When the race *began*, I *ran* as fast as I could.
sentences.zh: 比賽一開始，我就盡全力地跑。

sentences.en: Halfway through, I *fell* down and *hurt* my knee.
sentences.zh: 跑到一半，我跌倒了，膝蓋受傷。

sentences.en: Everyone *saw* it, and I wanted to give up.
sentences.zh: 大家都看到了，我好想放棄。

sentences.en: But then I *heard* my class shouting my name.
sentences.zh: 但接著我聽見全班在喊我的名字。

sentences.en: So I *stood* up and *ran* again.
sentences.zh: 所以我站起來，再次往前跑。

sentences.en: I did not *come* first. I *came* fourth.
sentences.zh: 我沒有得第一，我是第四名。

sentences.en: But when I crossed the line, my whole class *ran* to me.
sentences.zh: 但當我衝過終點線，全班都朝我跑來。

sentences.en: They *caught* me, and Kevin *gave* me a big smile.
sentences.zh: 他們扶住我，Kevin 給了我一個大大的微笑。

sentences.en: That day, I *lost* the race, but I *found* something better.
sentences.zh: 那天，我輸了比賽，卻找到了更棒的東西。

sentences.en: I finally *understood* what real friends are.
sentences.zh: 我終於明白了真正的朋友是什麼。

questions.q: Why did the boy only drink some milk in the morning?
questions.a: Because he felt nervous. (因為他覺得緊張。)

questions.q: What did the boy do after he fell down?
questions.a: He stood up and ran again. (他站起來，再次往前跑。)

questions.q: He lost the race, but what did he find?
questions.a: He found what real friends are. (他找到了真正的朋友是什麼／找到了真正的友情。)

stories.title: The Day the Storm Hit Our Town

sentences.en: Last August, a big storm *hit* our small town.
sentences.zh: 去年八月，一場大風暴突然侵襲了我們的小鎮。

sentences.en: The radio station *broadcast* a warning early in the morning, but we were already outside playing.
sentences.zh: 廣播電台一大早就播出了警報，但我們已經在外頭玩了。

sentences.en: Dark clouds *spread* across the sky in just a few minutes.
sentences.zh: 烏雲在短短幾分鐘內便擴散至整片天空。

sentences.en: The rain *wet* my whole body before I even reached the front door.
sentences.zh: 我還沒跑到大門口，雨水就把我全身淋濕了。

sentences.en: I rushed inside, and Mom *shut* all the windows quickly.
sentences.zh: 我衝進屋裡，媽媽迅速把所有窗戶都關上。

sentences.en: She *put* some old towels along the bottom of the door.
sentences.zh: 她把幾條舊毛巾塞在門縫下面。

sentences.en: Suddenly, a tree branch *burst* through our neighbor's car window with a loud crack.
sentences.zh: 突然間，一根樹枝嘩啦一聲衝破了鄰居的車窗。

sentences.en: My little sister *cut* her finger on a piece of broken glass.
sentences.zh: 我妹妹被一片碎玻璃割傷了手指。

sentences.en: It *hurt* badly, and she started to cry.
sentences.zh: 傷口很痛，她哭了起來。

sentences.en: Dad quickly *set* the first aid kit on the table.
sentences.zh: 爸爸迅速把急救箱放到桌上。

sentences.en: Mom *read* the instructions on the box out loud.
sentences.zh: 媽媽大聲朗讀盒子上的使用說明。

sentences.en: The storm *cost* our family a lot of money to fix the house.
sentences.zh: 這場風暴讓我們家花了很多錢才把房子修好。

sentences.en: It also *upset* many other families in our neighborhood.
sentences.zh: 它也讓附近許多家庭感到心煩意亂。

sentences.en: My sister *quit* trying to clean up and just sat down on the couch.
sentences.zh: 妹妹放棄了整理，乾脆坐在沙發上。

sentences.en: Dad *let* us all sleep in the living room that night.
sentences.zh: 那天晚上爸爸讓我們全都睡在客廳裡。

sentences.en: By the next morning, the damage had *spread* to almost every street in town.
sentences.zh: 到了隔天早上，損壞已經擴散到鎮上幾乎每一條街。

questions.q: What did the radio station do early in the morning?
questions.a: The radio station *broadcast* a warning early in the morning. (廣播電台一大早就播出了警報。)

questions.q: How did the sister get hurt?
questions.a: She *cut* her finger on a piece of broken glass, and it *hurt* badly. (她被碎玻璃割傷了手指，傷口很痛。)

questions.q: What did Dad do for the family that night?
questions.a: Dad *let* them all sleep in the living room. (爸爸讓他們全都睡在客廳裡。)

sentences.en: Last year, a new PE teacher named Mr. Lin *came* to our school.
sentences.zh: 去年，一位叫做林老師的新體育老師來到我們學校。

sentences.en: He *became* famous very quickly — everyone loved his fun classes.
sentences.zh: 他非常快就出了名——每個人都喜歡他有趣的課。

sentences.en: Every morning, he *ran* five laps around the track before the bell rang.
sentences.zh: 每天早上，在鐘響之前他都會繞著跑道跑五圈。

sentences.en: One Monday, a lazy student named Benny *came* to school early by accident.
sentences.zh: 某個星期一，一個懶惰的學生班尼意外地提早到了學校。

sentences.en: He saw Mr. Lin running and shouted, "I want to become as fast as you!"
sentences.zh: 他看見林老師在跑步，大喊：「我想要跑得和你一樣快！」

sentences.en: Mr. Lin smiled and said, "Then come back at seven tomorrow!"
sentences.zh: 林老師笑著說：「那就明天七點再來！」

sentences.en: The next morning, Benny *came* back at exactly seven o'clock.
sentences.zh: 隔天早上，班尼準時在七點回來了。

sentences.en: He *ran* with all his strength toward the finish line.
sentences.zh: 他全力衝向終點線。

sentences.en: But after just ten meters, he tripped over a cone and *became* a human bowling ball.
sentences.zh: 但才跑了十公尺，他就被錐形筒絆倒，變成了一顆人形保齡球。

sentences.en: He *ran* into five cones and knocked them all down in a perfect line.
sentences.zh: 他撞上了五個錐形筒，把它們全部整整齊齊地撞倒了。

sentences.en: Mr. Lin clapped slowly and said, "Benny, that was the most impressive ten meters I have ever seen."
sentences.zh: 林老師緩緩鼓掌說：「班尼，那是我所見過最令人印象深刻的十公尺。」

questions.q: Why did Mr. Lin come to school early every day?
questions.a: He *came* to school early and *ran* five laps around the track. (他早早來到學校，繞著跑道跑五圈。)

questions.q: What happened to Benny after he started running?
questions.a: Benny *ran* into five cones and *became* a human bowling ball. (班尼撞上五個錐形筒，變成了一顆人形保齡球。)

questions.q: How did Benny become famous at the end of the story?
questions.a: Benny *became* famous for running the most impressive ten meters ever seen. (班尼因為跑出大家所見過最令人印象深刻的十公尺而出了名。)

sentences.en: "I *thought* we were buying Ms. Chen's birthday gift together," said Mia.
sentences.zh: 「我以為我們要一起買陳老師的生日禮物，」米雅說。

sentences.en: Jay looked down and said, "I'm sorry. I already *bought* her a book this morning."
sentences.zh: 傑低下頭說：「對不起，我今天早上已經替她買了一本書。」

sentences.en: "A book?" said Mia. "I *thought* you were going to wait for me!"
sentences.zh: 「一本書？」米雅說，「我以為你會等我的！」

sentences.en: "I know," said Jay. "I *brought* it to school in my backpack."
sentences.zh: 「我知道，」傑說，「我已經把書裝在背包裡帶來學校了。」

sentences.en: "Well, I *bought* a card," Mia said. "Now she'll get two things separately."
sentences.zh: 「好吧，我買了一張卡，」米雅說，「這樣她會分別收到兩樣東西了。」

sentences.en: "Let's not fight about it," said Jay.
sentences.zh: 「我們別為這件事吵架嘛，」傑說。

sentences.en: "We *fought* about the science project last week, too!" said Mia.
sentences.zh: 「我們上週也為了科學作業吵架了！」米雅說。

sentences.en: "I *thought* about that," Jay said quietly. "I was wrong that time."
sentences.zh: 「我想過那件事，」傑輕聲說，「那次是我不對。」

sentences.en: "Ms. Chen *taught* us to always communicate better," said Mia.
sentences.zh: 「陳老師教導我們要多多溝通，」米雅說。

sentences.en: "She *taught* us a lot," Jay admitted. "I should have told you earlier."
sentences.zh: 「她教了我們很多，」傑承認道，「我應該早點告訴你的。」

sentences.en: Mia *caught* a glimpse of Jay's book sticking out of his bag.
sentences.zh: 米雅瞥見傑的書從包包裡露了出來。

sentences.en: "Oh no," she said. "I almost *bought* the same one!"
sentences.zh: 「哦不，」她說，「我差點買了一模一樣的！」

sentences.en: Jay laughed. "I *sought* the perfect gift in three different stores," he said.
sentences.zh: 傑笑了，「我在三家不同的店尋找完美的禮物，」他說。

sentences.en: "And I *caught* the last card at the bookstore just in time," said Mia, smiling now.
sentences.zh: 「而我剛好及時在書店搶到最後一張卡片，」米雅笑著說。

sentences.en: "So together," said Jay, "we *brought* her the perfect combination."
sentences.zh: 「那麼，」傑說，「我們合起來帶給她最完美的組合。」

sentences.en: "I *thought* you'd find a way to make this okay," said Mia.
sentences.zh: 「我就知道你會想出辦法讓一切都沒問題的，」米雅說。

questions.q: What did Jay bring to school for Ms. Chen?
questions.a: Jay *brought* a book to school in his backpack. (傑用背包把一本書帶來學校。)

questions.q: What did Ms. Chen teach her students?
questions.a: She *taught* them to always communicate better. (她教導他們要多多溝通。)

questions.q: How did Jay find the perfect gift for Ms. Chen?
questions.a: Jay *sought* the perfect gift in three different stores. (傑在三家不同的店尋找完美的禮物。)

stories.title: The Night Leo Could Not Sleep
stories.zh_title: 李奧睡不著的那個夜晚

sentences.en: One cold night, Grandma *swept* the floor before bed.
sentences.zh: 一個寒冷的夜晚，奶奶在睡前把地板掃乾淨。

sentences.en: She *kept* the lights low and the house quiet.
sentences.zh: 她把燈光調暗，讓家裡保持安靜。

sentences.en: Little Leo watched her from the doorway.
sentences.zh: 小李奧站在門口看著她。

sentences.en: "Why do you always sweep at night?" he asked.
sentences.zh: 「你為什麼每晚都要掃地？」他問。

sentences.en: "A clean home *kept* the bad dreams away," Grandma said softly.
sentences.zh: 「乾淨的家能趕走噩夢，」奶奶輕聲說道。

sentences.en: Leo nodded and went to his room.
sentences.zh: 李奧點點頭，走回自己的房間。

sentences.en: He lay down and soon *slept* without any worries.
sentences.zh: 他躺下來，很快就安心地睡著了。

sentences.en: But in the middle of the night, Leo heard a soft sound.
sentences.zh: 但在深夜，李奧聽到一個輕柔的聲音。

sentences.en: He walked to the living room and found Grandma sitting alone.
sentences.zh: 他走到客廳，發現奶奶獨自坐著。

sentences.en: Tears ran down her face — she *wept* quietly by the window.
sentences.zh: 淚水流下她的臉頰——她在窗邊輕聲哭泣。

sentences.en: "Grandma, what's wrong?" Leo asked softly.
sentences.zh: 「奶奶，你怎麼了？」李奧輕聲問。

sentences.en: She *kept* her voice steady and said, "I miss Grandpa."
sentences.zh: 她努力讓聲音穩住，說：「我想念爺爺。」

sentences.en: Leo sat beside her and held her hand tight.
sentences.zh: 李奧坐到她身邊，緊緊握住她的手。

sentences.en: They talked until the sadness *swept* away like a soft wind.
sentences.zh: 他們聊了很久，直到悲傷像微風一樣消散。

sentences.en: That night, Leo *slept* with a warm feeling in his heart.
sentences.zh: 那晚，李奧帶著心裡溫暖的感覺安然入睡。

questions.q: What did Grandma do every night before bed?
questions.a: She *swept* the floor before bed. （她在睡前把地板掃乾淨。）

questions.q: What was Grandma doing when Leo found her by the window?
questions.a: She *wept* quietly by the window. （她在窗邊輕聲哭泣。）

questions.q: How did Leo feel when he finally went back to sleep?
questions.a: He *slept* with a warm feeling in his heart. （他帶著溫暖的感覺安然入睡。）

sentences.en: "Tom *left* for Canada last week," Maya said to Ben.
sentences.zh: 「湯姆上週去加拿大了，」梅雅對班說。

sentences.en: "I know. I *felt* so sad when he went," Ben replied.
sentences.zh: 「我知道。他走的時候，我好難過，」班回答。

sentences.en: "I *spent* two whole days not knowing what to do," said Maya.
sentences.zh: 「我整整兩天不知道該怎麼辦，」梅雅說。

sentences.en: "What do you mean?" asked Ben.
sentences.zh: 「你是什麼意思？」班問。

sentences.en: "I *meant* we should do something special for him," Maya answered.
sentences.zh: 「我的意思是，我們應該為他做些特別的事，」梅雅回答。

sentences.en: "You *built* that little wooden box, right? Can we use it?" she asked.
sentences.zh: 「你做了那個小木盒，對吧？我們可以用它嗎？」她問。

sentences.en: "Sure! And I already *lent* you my blue paint. Remember?" Ben said.
sentences.zh: 「當然！而且我已經把藍色顏料借給你了，還記得嗎？」班說。

sentences.en: Maya *bent* down to pick up a pen from her bag.
sentences.zh: 梅雅彎下腰，從袋子裡撿起一支筆。

sentences.en: "What should I write?" she asked.
sentences.zh: 「我應該寫什麼？」她問。

sentences.en: "I *dealt* with the photos. You write the letter," Ben said.
sentences.zh: 「照片的部分我來處理。你來寫信，」班說。

sentences.en: Maya nodded and wrote for a long time.
sentences.zh: 梅雅點點頭，寫了很長一段時間。

sentences.en: "I *meant* every word," she said when she finished.
sentences.zh: 「每一個字我都是認真的，」她寫完後說。

sentences.en: "Perfect. Let's put everything in the box," Ben said.
sentences.zh: 「太棒了。我們把所有東西放進盒子裡吧，」班說。

sentences.en: The next morning, they *sent* the package to Tom's new address.
sentences.zh: 隔天早上，他們把包裹寄到湯姆的新地址。

sentences.en: "I hope he smiles when he opens it," Maya said with a warm smile.
sentences.zh: 「我希望他打開時會微笑，」梅雅帶著溫暖的笑說。

questions.q: Why did Maya and Ben want to make a gift?
questions.a: Because Tom *left* for Canada last week. （因為湯姆上週去了加拿大。）

questions.q: What did Ben make that they could use for the gift?
questions.a: He *built* a small wooden box. （他做了一個小木盒。）

questions.q: When did they send the package to Tom?
questions.a: They *sent* it the next morning. （他們隔天早上把它寄出去了。）

stories.title: The Night of the Big Storm

sentences.en: Last summer, our class *met* at the foot of a big mountain for a camping trip.
sentences.zh: 去年夏天，我們全班在一座大山腳下集合，準備去露營。

sentences.en: Our teacher, Mr. Lin, *led* us along a narrow forest trail.
sentences.zh: 我們的林老師帶著我們沿著一條狹窄的森林小徑前行。

sentences.en: We *found* a perfect campsite near a cool stream.
sentences.zh: 我們在一條清涼的小溪旁找到了一個完美的紮營地點。

sentences.en: Sam *dug* a small hole to build the campfire.
sentences.zh: 山姆挖了一個小坑來搭建營火。

sentences.en: Mr. Lin *lit* the fire, and everyone cheered.
sentences.zh: 林老師點燃了營火，大家都歡呼起來。

sentences.en: We *fed* the fire with dry wood to keep warm.
sentences.zh: 我們用乾木頭餵養營火，讓自己保持溫暖。

sentences.en: Then a storm *struck* without warning.
sentences.zh: 接著，一場暴風雨毫無預警地來臨。

sentences.en: A rope on a tree *swung* wildly in the strong wind.
sentences.zh: 樹上的一條繩子在強風中劇烈搖擺。

sentences.en: We *lost* our map in the dark.
sentences.zh: 我們在黑暗中弄丟了地圖。

sentences.en: A wet rock *slid* down the slope and knocked over our tent.
sentences.zh: 一塊溼石頭從坡上滑下來，把我們的帳篷撞倒了。

sentences.en: Mr. Lin *held* his flashlight high and told us to stay calm.
sentences.zh: 林老師舉高手電筒，叫我們保持冷靜。

sentences.en: He *hung* a bright orange flag from a tall branch so we could be seen.
sentences.zh: 他在高高的樹枝上掛了一面鮮橘色旗子，讓別人能看到我們。

sentences.en: We all *sat* close together under a big rock for shelter.
sentences.zh: 我們全都緊靠在一起，躲在一塊大岩石下避風雨。

sentences.en: Suddenly, I *heard* a helicopter in the distance.
sentences.zh: 突然，我聽到遠方有直升機的聲音。

sentences.en: Mr. Lin *shot* a signal flare into the dark sky.
sentences.zh: 林老師向漆黑的天空發射了一枚信號彈。

sentences.en: The rescue team *found* us and took us home safely.
sentences.zh: 救援隊找到了我們，安全地把我們帶回家。

sentences.en: Later, our class *won* an award for staying calm in the storm.
sentences.zh: 後來，我們班因為在暴風雨中保持冷靜而獲得了一個獎項。

questions.q: How did Mr. Lin call for help during the storm?
questions.a: He *shot* a signal flare into the dark sky. （他向漆黑的天空發射了一枚信號彈。）

questions.q: Where did the students go to stay safe from the storm?
questions.a: They *sat* close together under a big rock. （他們緊靠在一起，躲在一塊大岩石下。）

questions.q: What did the class win after the camping trip?
questions.a: They *won* an award for staying calm in the storm. （他們因為在暴風雨中保持冷靜而獲獎。）

sentences.en: Lily *stood* outside a small bakery and looked inside.
sentences.zh: 莉莉站在一家小麵包店外面往裡看。

sentences.en: "Good morning!" Mr. Chen *said*. "Come in!"
sentences.zh: 「早安！」陳先生說。「進來吧！」

sentences.en: "Good morning," Lily *said*. "My mom *told* me about your bread."
sentences.zh: 「早安，」莉莉說。「我媽媽告訴過我你的麵包。」

sentences.en: "She *had* a slice last week and loved it," Lily *said*.
sentences.zh: 「她上星期吃了一片，非常喜歡，」莉莉說。

sentences.en: Mr. Chen smiled. "I *made* a new batch this morning," he *said*.
sentences.zh: 陳先生微笑著。「我今天早上做了一批新的，」他說。

sentences.en: "I *laid* them on the counter at six o'clock," he *told* her.
sentences.zh: 「我六點鐘就把它們放到了櫃台上，」他告訴她。

sentences.en: "I *sold* half of them before eight," he *said*.
sentences.zh: 「八點前我就賣掉了一半，」他說。

sentences.en: Lily *understood* why people came here every day.
sentences.zh: 莉莉懂了為什麼大家每天都來這裡。

sentences.en: "How much for one?" she asked.
sentences.zh: 「一個多少錢？」她問。

sentences.en: "One dollar each," Mr. Chen *said*.
sentences.zh: 「每個一塊錢，」陳先生說。

sentences.en: Lily *had* only two dollars, but she smiled.
sentences.zh: 莉莉只有兩塊錢，但她笑了。

sentences.en: She *paid* for two rolls and *said*, "Thank you so much!"
sentences.zh: 她付了兩個麵包捲的錢，說：「非常謝謝你！」

sentences.en: "Come back tomorrow!" Mr. Chen *said* with a big smile.
sentences.zh: 「明天再來！」陳先生帶著大大的微笑說。

questions.q: What did Lily's mom tell her before she went to the bakery?
questions.a: She told Lily about the bakery. (她告訴莉莉這家麵包店。)

questions.q: How much of the bread did Mr. Chen sell before eight o'clock?
questions.a: He sold half of the bread rolls before eight. (他八點前就賣掉了一半的麵包捲。)

questions.q: How much did Lily pay for the rolls?
questions.a: She paid two dollars for two rolls. (她付了兩塊錢買了兩個麵包捲。)

sentences.en: Last summer, my class went to a swim camp for a week.
sentences.zh: 去年夏天，我們班去了一個游泳夏令營，待了一個星期。

sentences.en: Every day *began* with an early swim in the pool.
sentences.zh: 每天都從一大早在泳池裡游泳開始。

sentences.en: The coach *rang* the bell at seven sharp.
sentences.zh: 教練在七點整打響了鈴聲。

sentences.en: We jumped in and *swam* three laps together.
sentences.zh: 我們跳進去，一起游了三趟。

sentences.en: My friend Leo *drank* some pool water by mistake.
sentences.zh: 我的朋友里歐不小心喝了一些泳池的水。

sentences.en: He laughed, and his goggles *sank* to the bottom.
sentences.zh: 他笑了，他的護目鏡沉到了底部。

sentences.en: That evening, we had a talent show.
sentences.zh: 那天傍晚，我們舉辦了才藝表演。

sentences.en: The show had already *begun* when I found my seat.
sentences.zh: 當我找到座位的時候，表演已經開始了。

sentences.en: My classmate Mia *sang* two beautiful songs on stage.
sentences.zh: 我的同學米雅在台上唱了兩首美麗的歌。

sentences.en: When she had *sung* the last note, everyone cheered.
sentences.zh: 當她唱完最後一個音符，大家都歡呼了。

sentences.en: After the show, we sat outside and *drank* hot chocolate.
sentences.zh: 演出結束後，我們坐在外面喝了熱巧克力。

sentences.en: Someone *began* to sing a camp song around the fire.
sentences.zh: 有人開始在營火旁唱起了一首營地歌曲。

sentences.en: Soon, we all *sang* along and laughed under the stars.
sentences.zh: 很快地，我們全都一起跟著唱，在星空下歡笑。

sentences.en: I had never *swum* so much before, but I loved every moment.
sentences.zh: 我以前從來沒有游過那麼多，但我愛每一刻。

questions.q: How did every day start at the swim camp?
questions.a: Every day began with an early swim in the pool. (每天都從一大早在泳池裡游泳開始。)

questions.q: What happened to Leo's goggles in the pool?
questions.a: His goggles sank to the bottom. (他的護目鏡沉到了底部。)

questions.q: What did Mia do at the talent show?
questions.a: She sang two beautiful songs on stage. (她在台上唱了兩首美麗的歌。)

sentences.en: Last spring, my family went to a big park on a windy day.
sentences.zh: 去年春天，我的家人在一個有風的日子去了一座大公園。

sentences.en: My dad *knew* the perfect spot to fly kites there.
sentences.zh: 我爸爸知道那裡放風箏的完美地點。

sentences.en: He *grew* up flying kites in that very park.
sentences.zh: 他就是在那座公園裡長大放風箏的。

sentences.en: The wind *blew* hard and the sky was bright blue.
sentences.zh: 風吹得很大，天空是亮藍色的。

sentences.en: My sister *drew* the kite design herself — a red dragon.
sentences.zh: 我姊姊自己設計了風箏的圖案——一條紅龍。

sentences.en: Dad *threw* the kite into the air and let go of the string.
sentences.zh: 爸爸把風箏拋向空中，然後放開了線。

sentences.en: The kite *flew* up, up, and up into the blue sky.
sentences.zh: 風箏越飛越高，飛進了蔚藍的天空。

sentences.en: Birds *flew* past the kite and seemed surprised.
sentences.zh: 鳥兒飛過風箏旁邊，好像感到很驚訝。

sentences.en: I *knew* it would be a great day.
sentences.zh: 我就知道這會是很棒的一天。

sentences.en: Mom *drew* a picture of us holding the kite string.
sentences.zh: 媽媽畫了一幅我們拿著風箏線的畫。

sentences.en: Then a strong gust *blew* the kite even higher.
sentences.zh: 接著一陣強風把風箏吹得更高了。

sentences.en: The kite had *flown* farther than we expected.
sentences.zh: 風箏飛得比我們預期的還要遠。

sentences.en: My little brother *threw* a paper airplane into the wind too.
sentences.zh: 我弟弟也把一架紙飛機丟進了風裡。

sentences.en: The trees had *grown* tall around us, and the park looked beautiful.
sentences.zh: 周圍的樹木長得很高大，公園看起來很美麗。

sentences.en: The wind *blew* softly at last, and we sat down to rest.
sentences.zh: 風終於輕輕地吹著，我們坐下來休息。

questions.q: What did Dad do with the kite at the park?
questions.a: He threw the kite into the air. (他把風箏拋向空中。)

questions.q: Who drew the kite design?
questions.a: My sister drew the kite design — a red dragon. (我姊姊設計了風箏的圖案——一條紅龍。)

questions.q: How was the weather when they arrived at the park?
questions.a: The wind blew hard and the sky was bright blue. (風吹得很大，天空是亮藍色的。)

sentences.en: Last winter, Mia *woke* up with a great idea.
sentences.zh: 去年冬天，米亞醒來有了一個好主意。

sentences.en: She *chose* the softest blue wool at the market.
sentences.zh: 她在市場選了最柔軟的藍色羊毛。

sentences.en: She *wove* it carefully into a warm scarf.
sentences.zh: 她小心翼翼地把它編成一條溫暖的圍巾。

sentences.en: She *spoke* to her friend Leo about it.
sentences.zh: 她把這件事跟朋友里奧說了。

sentences.en: She wanted to give the scarf to her grandmother as a gift.
sentences.zh: 她想把圍巾當禮物送給奶奶。

sentences.en: But when she *got* home, she found her bag on the floor.
sentences.zh: 但當她到家時，她發現她的袋子在地板上。

sentences.en: Someone had *stolen* the scarf!
sentences.zh: 有人偷走了圍巾！

sentences.en: Mia *got* very upset.
sentences.zh: 米亞非常難過。

sentences.en: She *froze* at the door, unable to move.
sentences.zh: 她在門口愣住了，動彈不得。

sentences.en: She had *forgotten* to zip her bag that morning.
sentences.zh: 那天早上她忘記拉上袋子的拉鍊。

sentences.en: Her heart *broke* when she thought about Grandma.
sentences.zh: 想到奶奶時，她的心碎了。

sentences.en: She ran to tell her teacher.
sentences.zh: 她跑去告訴她的老師。

sentences.en: The teacher helped find the scarf.
sentences.zh: 老師幫忙找到了圍巾。

sentences.en: It was not *broken* — just a little dirty.
sentences.zh: 它沒有損壞，只是有點髒。

questions.q: What did Mia choose at the market?
questions.a: She *chose* the softest blue wool. 她選了最柔軟的藍色羊毛。

questions.q: What happened to the scarf?
questions.a: Someone had *stolen* it. 有人偷走了它。

questions.q: What did Mia forget to do that morning?
questions.a: She had *forgotten* to zip her bag. 她忘記拉上袋子的拉鍊。

sentences.en: Max *wrote* a note to get out of gym class.
sentences.zh: 馬克斯寫了一張便條，想逃掉體育課。

sentences.en: He *hid* it inside his book.
sentences.zh: 他把它藏在書裡。

sentences.en: But his dog had *hidden* it somewhere else!
sentences.zh: 但他的狗把它藏到別的地方了！

sentences.en: Max *rode* his bike to school with no excuse note.
sentences.zh: 馬克斯騎自行車上學，手上沒有便條。

sentences.en: He had *written* three drafts but lost them all.
sentences.zh: 他已經寫了三份草稿，但全都弄丟了。

sentences.en: In gym class, a bee *bit* him on the nose.
sentences.zh: 在體育課上，一隻蜜蜂咬了他的鼻子。

sentences.en: Now he had a real excuse — a bee had *bitten* him!
sentences.zh: 現在他有了真正的藉口——一隻蜜蜂咬了他！

sentences.en: But the teacher laughed.
sentences.zh: 但老師笑了。

sentences.en: She had *ridden* a horse that morning and was in a great mood.
sentences.zh: 她那天早上騎了馬，心情非常好。

sentences.en: "You should have *written* about your dog," she said with a smile.
sentences.zh: 「你應該寫關於你的狗的事，」她微笑著說。

questions.q: What did Max write at the beginning of the story?
questions.a: He *wrote* a note to get out of gym class. 他寫了一張便條，想逃掉體育課。

questions.q: What happened to Max during gym class?
questions.a: A bee *bit* him on the nose. 一隻蜜蜂咬了他的鼻子。

questions.q: Why was the teacher in such a great mood?
questions.a: She had *ridden* a horse that morning. 她那天早上騎了馬。

sentences.en: Amy *wore* the same ugly school shirt every day.
sentences.zh: 艾咪每天都穿著同一件醜陋的校服。

sentences.en: She had *worn* it for three years.
sentences.zh: 她已經穿了三年了。

sentences.en: One day, she *tore* it on a nail by the door.
sentences.zh: 有一天，她把它勾在門邊的釘子上，撕破了。

sentences.en: The shirt was badly *torn* down the side.
sentences.zh: 那件衣服的側面被撕得很破。

sentences.en: She *bore* the embarrassment all morning.
sentences.zh: 她整個早上都忍受著那份尷尬。

sentences.en: At lunch, she *swore* she would change the school uniform rules.
sentences.zh: 午餐時，她發誓要改變校服規定。

sentences.en: She had *sworn* this before, but never did anything.
sentences.zh: 她以前也發誓過，但從沒真正行動。

sentences.en: She *bore* the heavy feeling in her chest all afternoon.
sentences.zh: 她整個下午都忍受著胸口那股沉重的感覺。

sentences.en: She *wore* her jacket to cover the tear.
sentences.zh: 她穿上外套來遮住破洞。

sentences.en: After school, she wrote a letter to the principal.
sentences.zh: 放學後，她寫了一封信給校長。

sentences.en: She listed all the problems she had *borne* for years.
sentences.zh: 她列出了多年來忍受的所有問題。

sentences.en: The principal read the letter carefully.
sentences.zh: 校長仔細地讀了那封信。

sentences.en: A week later, the school got new uniforms.
sentences.zh: 一週後，學校換了新制服。

sentences.en: Amy smiled when she *tore* up her old shirt.
sentences.zh: 當艾咪撕碎她的舊衣服時，她笑了。

questions.q: What happened to Amy's shirt one day?
questions.a: She *tore* it on a nail, and it was badly *torn*. 她把它勾在釘子上撕破了，撕得很嚴重。

questions.q: What did Amy swear to do at lunch?
questions.a: She *swore* she would change the school uniform rules. 她發誓要改變校服規定。

questions.q: What did Amy list in her letter to the principal?
questions.a: She listed all the problems she had *borne* for years. 她列出了多年來忍受的所有問題。

sentences.en: Sara *saw* Ben sitting alone after the big game.
sentences.zh: 大賽後，沙拉看到班獨自坐在那裡。

sentences.en: "I *was* so nervous during the last minute," Ben said.
sentences.zh: 「最後一分鐘我非常緊張，」班說。

sentences.en: "You *did* great out there," Sara told him.
sentences.zh: 「你在場上表現很好，」沙拉告訴他。

sentences.en: "But their team *beat* us by five points," Ben said sadly.
sentences.zh: 「但對方以五分之差打敗我們，」班難過地說。

sentences.en: "We have never *been* this unlucky before," Sara agreed.
sentences.zh: 「我們以前從來沒這麼不走運過，」沙拉附和道。

sentences.en: "Our coach *gave* us a long talk after," Ben said.
sentences.zh: 「我們的教練賽後給了我們一頓長篇大論，」班說。

sentences.en: "He *showed* us our mistakes on video," Ben continued.
sentences.zh: 「他在影片裡給我們看了我們的錯誤，」班繼續說。

sentences.en: "He also *took* away our phones during the meeting," Ben added.
sentences.zh: 「他還在訓話期間把我們的手機沒收了，」班補充道。

sentences.en: "I *ate* nothing after the game," Ben said quietly.
sentences.zh: 「我賽後什麼都沒吃，」班輕聲說。

sentences.en: "I *went* straight home and felt terrible," he added.
sentences.zh: 「我直接回家，感覺很糟，」他補充說。

sentences.en: "My mom *drove* me home in silence," Ben said.
sentences.zh: 「我媽默默地開車送我回家，」班說。

sentences.en: "The sun *rose* before I could fall asleep," he continued.
sentences.zh: 「太陽升起來了，我還是睡不著，」他繼續說。

sentences.en: Sara *shook* her head. "That's really tough."
sentences.zh: 沙拉搖搖頭。「真的很難熬。」

sentences.en: "I even *fell* asleep in class today," Ben admitted with a weak smile.
sentences.zh: 「我今天甚至在課堂上睡著了，」班帶著苦笑承認。

sentences.en: "Have you *forgiven* yourself?" Sara asked gently.
sentences.zh: 「你原諒自己了嗎？」沙拉輕聲問。

sentences.en: "Not yet, but this loss has *driven* me to practice harder," Ben said with a smile.
sentences.zh: 「還沒，但這次的失敗已經激勵我更努力練習了，」班微笑著說。

questions.q: How did Sara find Ben after the game?
questions.a: She *saw* him sitting alone. 她看到他獨自坐著。

questions.q: What did the coach do during the team meeting?
questions.hint: 用 show 或 take 回答
questions.a: He *showed* them their mistakes on video and *took* away their phones. 他給他們看了影片中的錯誤，並沒收了他們的手機。

questions.q: What did the loss do for Ben in the end?
questions.a: It had *driven* him to practice harder. 它激勵他更努力練習了。
